nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers daily at 7:00 AM to check for auctions with Surplus List data ready for processing.

nodes.name: Get Auctions with Surplus List
nodes.notes: Queries Airtable for auctions that have a Surplus List but don't have any Foreclosures created yet. Downloads the Surplus List attachments.

nodes.name: Process Each Auction
nodes.notes: Processes each auction that has a Surplus List but no Foreclosures yet. Extracts attachment information and prepares binary data for PDF processing.

nodes.name: Extract PDF Text
nodes.notes: Extracts the text content from the PDF attachment using n8n's built-in PDF extraction capabilities.

nodes.name: Parse PDF Content
nodes.notes: Parses the extracted PDF text to identify foreclosure information including parcel IDs, addresses, owners, and amounts.

nodes.name: Create CSV File
nodes.notes: Creates a CSV file containing the extracted foreclosure information for further processing or review.

nodes.name: Workflow Complete

parameters.description: End of the workflow. The extracted foreclosure data is now available as a CSV file.

nodes.notes: Workflow complete. In a production implementation, additional steps could include creating foreclosure records in Airtable, sending notifications, or triggering other processes.
